overall.description: First-person exploration gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, traversing a rooftop shanty town in a futuristic city. The player ascends from a narrow corridor to open rooftops with panoramic views of neon-lit skyscrapers, then explores a covered arcade area with pachinko machines and NPCs before continuing through corrugated metal walkways and scaffolding.

emerges from shadow into bright direct sunlight on rooftop

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow industrial corridor with corrugated metal walls. The player ascends a metal staircase, transitioning from the enclosed space to an open rooftop. Bright sunlight replaces the shadowed interior as the player steps onto a grated metal walkway with a small corrugated shack visible to the right.

events.description: pans right to reveal expansive cityscape with towering skyscrapers
approaching covered shanty town area with hanging paper lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking along rooftop walkways while observing the futuristic cityscape and neon signage

large floating holographic advertisement above the city

traditional Japanese-style paper lanterns hanging near the bar entrance

segments.scene_description: The player explores an open rooftop with panoramic views of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape. Towering skyscrapers with neon signs and holographic billboards dominate the background. The player walks along wooden and metal walkways past corrugated metal shanty structures, approaching an area with hanging paper lanterns that signal a transition to a covered settlement area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered rooftop bar and arcade area

events.description: enters shaded area under corrugated metal roofing with dappled sunlight
approaches doorway leading to indoor arcade with pachinko machines

agents.ego_description: walking into a covered shanty town area with bars and arcade machines, passing under paper lanterns

notable_agents.action: person sitting at the outdoor bar counter

entered.detail: makeshift bar built from corrugated metal sheets with wooden counter
retro-style arcade game cabinets with glowing screens
row of Japanese pachinko gambling machines with bright displays
red neon signage with XXX and heart symbols

segments.scene_description: The player enters a semi-covered rooftop settlement area shaded by corrugated metal roofing. Traditional paper lanterns hang above a makeshift bar structure. The player walks past arcade machines and approaches a row of pachinko machines, with red neon signs visible in the background. The lighting shifts from bright sun to dappled shade as the player moves deeper into the covered area.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor pachinko parlor with neon lighting

events.description: interior illuminated by red neon signs and machine glow replaces natural light
exits indoor arcade back to outdoor rooftop corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through the dimly lit arcade, observing NPCs and machines, then exiting back outside

notable_agents.action: standing figure in red pants near the pachinko machines
seated person on red mat drinking near the wall

entered.detail: bright red neon sign with XXX and heart symbols on the back wall
red neon sign indicating 24-hour operation with Japanese characters
industrial metal shelving units against the wall
tight passageway between corrugated metal walls leading outside

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dimly lit indoor pachinko parlor illuminated by red neon signs. Two NPCs are visible—one standing near the machines and another sitting against the wall. The player moves through the narrow space, passing rows of gambling machines, then exits through a doorway back to the brighter outdoor rooftop area, transitioning from artificial neon light to natural sunlight.

events.description: enters narrow indoor room with window overlooking the city
turns toward metal scaffolding and stairs leading upward

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow rooftop corridors, passing NPCs, and approaching scaffolding stairs

notable_agents.action: person in yellow shirt standing near doorway

entered.detail: external AC units mounted on the corrugated metal walls
orange metal scaffolding with stairs leading to upper level
large window opening showing cityscape with steam vents

segments.scene_description: The player traverses narrow rooftop corridors between corrugated metal structures, passing air conditioning units and a window overlooking the city. An NPC in a yellow shirt stands near a doorway. The player moves through tight indoor spaces and emerges to approach orange metal scaffolding with stairs leading upward, continuing the exploration of the vertical shanty town structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined industrial corridor through a sprawling rooftop shanty town and into a neon-lit gaming parlor. It begins by ascending a metal staircase, moving from a shadowed interior into the bright sunlight of an open rooftop characterized by grated walkways and a panoramic view of towering cyberpunk skyscrapers. As the camera traverses wooden paths past corrugated shacks, the scene shifts from the open skyline toward a semi-covered settlement where dappled shade and hanging paper lanterns lead the way to a row of pachinko machines. The movement then flows into a dimly lit indoor parlor illuminated by red neon signs and populated by NPCs, before exiting back into the natural light of the rooftop. Finally, the camera navigates narrow corridors past air conditioning units and a resident in a yellow shirt, moving through tight indoor spaces to reach orange metal scaffolding that leads further upward into the vertical city.
